2606.31683.title: Histogram-constrained Image Generation
2606.31683.paper_summary: Diffusion models have emerged as a dominant paradigm in generative modeling, enabling high-fidelity sampling from complex data distributions. Despite impressive capabilities, controlling diffusion models to produce outputs aligned with user intent remains an open challenge, especially when balancing global coherence with local precision. Existing control mechanisms vary in the granularity of their conditioning signals. For example, textual prompts guide generation globally through high-level semantics, while ControlNet-like approaches secure precise local structure via dense conditions. In this work, we introduce Histogram-constrained Image Generation (HIG), a novel control mechanism that falls into the middle ground of control granularity. Our framework enforces user-specified distributional constraints (e.g., color histograms or latent token distributions) during the generation process with exact precision. We model such control as an optimal transport (OT) problem and apply explicit guidance transformations during sampling, thereby driving the diffusion trajectory to align with the desired histogram. We demonstrate the versatility of HIG across diverse applications, including constrained generation via color/latent histograms and high-capacity information embedding through histogram-level encoding. Our findings underscore the promise of distributional control, a flexible and interpretable control scheme that is fully compatible with existing control mechanisms, diversifying the hybrid strategies for controllable image generation. Our project page is available at: https://maps-research.github.io/hig/.
2606.31683.paper_summary_zh: 擴散模型已成為生成建模中的主導範式，使得從複雜數據分佈中進行高保真取樣成為可能。儘管具備令人印象深刻的能力，控制擴散模型以產生與用戶意圖一致的輸出仍然是一個未解的挑戰，尤其是在平衡全球一致性與局部精確性方面。現有的控制機制在其條件信號的細緻程度上各不相同。例如，文本提示通過高層次的語義在全球範圍內引導生成，而類似ControlNet的方法則通過密集的條件確保精確的局部結構。在本研究中，我們介紹了直方圖約束圖像生成（HIG），這是一種新穎的控制機制，位於控制細緻度的中間地帶。我們的框架在生成過程中以精確的方式強制執行用戶指定的分佈約束（例如，顏色直方圖或潛在標記分佈）。我們將這種控制建模為最佳運輸（OT）問題，並在取樣過程中應用顯式指導轉換，從而驅動擴散軌跡與所需的直方圖對齊。我們展示了HIG在多樣應用中的多功能性，包括通過顏色/潛在直方圖進行的約束生成以及通過直方圖級編碼進行的高容量信息嵌入。我們的研究結果強調了分佈控制的潛力，這是一種靈活且可解釋的控制方案，與現有控制機制完全兼容，擴展了可控圖像生成的混合策略。我們的項目頁面可在以下網址訪問：https://maps-research.github.io/hig/。
2606.31683.author: Haoming Liu et.al.
2606.31683.authors: Haoming Liu, Yuanhe Guo, Yijia Cao, Shenji Wan, Hongyi Wen
